channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: OCBC rolls out its avatar banking platform with Wendy and Wayne, two virtual financial advisors, as banks integrate AI into wealth management
item.description: New CEO Tan Teck Long pledged to hire 600 new relationship managers as wealth management grows for the Singaporean bank.

item.title: America needs 3.8 million manufacturing workers. This CEO has a blueprint to find them
item.description: Saint-Gobain North America's CEO says the real threat to America's future is a shortage of skilled workers, not a lack of innovation.

item.title: America at 250: why the Constitution was built to restrain government, not celebrate majority rule
item.description: The founders designed the Constitution to protect liberty and property from majoritarian excess, but a century of emergencies has eroded it.

item.title: How Gen Z can survive the jobpocalypse, based on my experience building an AI company in 2015
item.description: As AI reduces creation and analysis costs, companies will demand more from workers, not fewer hires. Some will excel.
